subcodes.first_line: O thou who seekest shelter beneath the shade of God's favors! Thy letters were received and became the cause of spiritual joy and fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استظل فی ظل الطاف الله مراسلات شما واصل و سبب روح و ریحان گردید از
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer, @the state of enkindlement in teaching
